seo.title: Who We Are - DSRC | About Us
seo.description: Learn about DSRC's five decades of engineering excellence and innovation.

hero.title: WHO WE ARE
hero.subtitle: Engineering strength and agile innovation, delivering excellence for over five decades.

paragraphs: DSRC is a global technology solutions company with over 50 years of engineering excellence, headquartered in Chennai, India, with offices in the United States, United Kingdom, and the Netherlands.

Founded in 1973, DSRC has evolved from a pioneering software company into a trusted global partner for businesses seeking to innovate and scale with confidence. We provide Consulting & Technical Advisory, Custom Software Development, Application Modernisation, and Cloud Management Services.
Our 350+ skilled engineers work closely with clients to design and develop secure, scalable, and future-ready digital solutions tailored to their goals.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the unrivaled partner of choice for organisations globally, delivering innovative and transformative technology solutions that drive sustainable growth and competitive advantage.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide scalable, cost-effective, and high-quality development teams and project management capabilities that empower our clients to achieve their technology objectives and business aspirations.

difference.title: The DSRC Difference
difference.subtitle: With over 50 years of experience and 350+ skilled engineers, DSRC delivers innovative technology solutions to global enterprises across multiple continents.

companyOverview.title: Company Overview
companyOverview.text: With over 50 years of innovation and client partnerships, DSRC has built a legacy of delivering enterprise-grade technology solutions that drive meaningful business outcomes. Our journey from a Chennai-based software company to a global technology partner reflects our commitment to engineering excellence, continuous innovation, and client success.

items.title: Ambitious & Entrepreneurial
items.description: We set bold goals and pursue them with relentless determination, fostering an entrepreneurial spirit that drives breakthrough solutions.

items.title: Insightful & Experienced
items.description: With five decades of expertise, we bring deep industry knowledge and technical insight to every engagement.

items.title: Ethical, Honest & Professional
items.description: Integrity is at the core of everything we do. We maintain the highest standards of professionalism and ethical conduct.

items.title: Responsive & Responsible
items.description: We are committed to being responsive to our clients' needs while taking responsibility for delivering quality outcomes.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We continuously explore new technologies and methodologies to deliver cutting-edge solutions that keep our clients ahead.

items.title: Disruptive
items.description: We challenge the status quo and embrace disruptive thinking to create breakthrough solutions that redefine possibilities.

items.title: Collaborative
items.description: We believe in the power of teamwork, fostering strong partnerships with our clients and within our teams.

items.title: Hardworking
items.description: We are dedicated to delivering excellence through hard work, discipline, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
